name: Lemon Sesame Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the chicken and pat dry.
2. Beat egg and water together.
3. Combine the next four dry ingredients (paprika, onion powder, poultry seasoning).
4. Dip each chicken piece in the egg mixture, then coat with flour.
5. Brown the chicken pieces in oil.
6. Add remaining ingredients except sesame seeds to the pan. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
7. Remove chicken from the pan.
8. Thicken the liquid using the leftover flour mixture.
9. Pour the sauce over the chicken and sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds.
10. Makes 4 servings.
